utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists physical_health plan with cost, mental_health plan with cost, and a combined cost (€330/month). Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists EliteHome Premium Coverage (€95/month) and cost €95/month. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists PrimeTravel Premium Plan (€115/month), an adventure add-on (€80/month), and total cost €195/month. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. It lists Adventure Travel Coverage (€80/month). Although this duplicates the add-on already included under travel, it still specifies an enhancement with cost. Considered specified. 5) total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided as €620/month and €7440/year. Fully specified. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully specified.
